recap: Added --no-dispatch flag to init.zsh zparseopts and fzf-dispatch early return; tests and glossary updated

Rewrote ctrl-r into 11 single-concern functions with eager/lazy colorization, cache under ctrl-r/ subdir, --refresh-cache with mutex+spinner, behavioral tests for fzf-history-entries and fzf-history-highlight-line

Added default fzf-postprocess to init.zsh; removed identical boilerplate from ctrl-o, ctrl-p, ctrl-shift-o, ctrl-shift-p, fzf-apt-packages, fzf-bats-test, fzf-docker-images, fzf-git-files-dirty-stageable, fzf-plans, ctrl-r

Moved mutex into fzf-history-update-cache (returns 2 when taken); renamed refresh-cache to regenerate-cache; removed count param; regenerate-cache prints message on stderr when mutex taken; fixed mkdir/mv/rm alias bypass with backslash prefix
